name: ai-write-extension
description: Generate Arduino code from VS Code using an AI chat prompt.

aiWriteExtension.openAIApiKey.markdownDescription: OpenAI API key used to call the chat API.

aiWriteExtension.model.description: Model name used for code generation.

aiWriteExtension.systemPrompt.default: You are an Arduino expert. Return practical, compilable Arduino code with short explanation.
aiWriteExtension.systemPrompt.description: System prompt sent to the AI model.
